name: Haricot Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Put beans into a saucepan with enough hot water to cover well. Bring to boiling point, then boil for 2 minutes.
2. Remove from heat and let cool in the water for 1 hour.
3. Cut the meat into large cubes and brown well all over in oil.
4. Add the onion and cook gently until lightly tinted, stirring frequently.
5. Sprinkle the flour over, add garlic and stir for 2-3 minutes.
6. Add the drained tomatoes, salt, pepper, parsley, bay leaf, thyme, and marjoram tied together.
7. Transfer to an oven-proof dish, cover, and cook in a moderately slow oven for 1 hour.
